style_guide.base_prompt_suffix: Chinese ink wash painting meets cyberpunk aesthetic, Dunhuang mural mineral pigment colors, cinematic composition, 4K, 16:9 widescreen. No text, no watermark.
style_guide.mailo_description: A 14-year-old Chinese girl with long black hair, delicate features, wearing a damp grey-blue short jacket with oversized sleeves covering her fingers. Barefoot.
style_guide.vita_description: A tiny palm-sized silver-white cat-like spirit creature with three tails, short fur with a faint blue sheen, pointed ears with a tuft of white fur at the tips, amber eyes.

panels.description_cn: 章节标题画面。九色渊全景俯视，九条色带从渊心向外旋转，整个画面像一个巨大的万花筒。标题「第一章·入画」浮于画面正中。
panels.prompt: Extreme high angle top-down view of a mystical circular pool surrounded by green jade-like mountains. Nine distinct bands of color spiral outward from the center: mineral green, ochre yellow, carmine pink, raven blue, moon white, cinnabar red, vine yellow, smoke purple, and stone blue. The bands move like a slow millstone, never mixing. The water surface is perfectly still, mirror-like. Mountains frame the pool on all sides, their peaks wrapped in solid silver-grey clouds that cling to the mountainsides like ancient bandages. No birds in the sky above the pool. Moss on shore stones stops abruptly at the waterline. Chinese ink wash painting meets cyberpunk aesthetic, Dunhuang mural mineral pigment colors, dominant palette: #3CB371 #F0E68C #FFBF00 #DDA0DD #87CEEB #1C1C3A, cinematic composition, 4K, 16:9 widescreen. No text, no watermark.
panels.narration: 九色渊的水有九种颜色。
panels.notes: Opening shot. Establish the mythic scale. The stillness is key — no ripples, no wind.

panels.description_cn: 九条色带的近距离特写。石青、石绿、赭黄、胭脂等颜色贴着走，界线分明，像九条蛇共用一个窝。水面如凝固的颜料，厚重而温吞。
panels.prompt: Extreme close-up of water surface showing nine distinct bands of color flowing in a slow spiral. Mineral blue, stone green, ochre yellow, carmine red, raven blue, moon white, cinnabar, vine yellow, smoke purple — each band perfectly separated, touching but never mixing, like nine serpents sharing one nest. The water has a thick, viscous quality, like liquid pigment. No ripples, no disturbance. The texture is dense and warm. Reflections of jade-green mountain walls shimmer at the edges. Chinese ink wash painting meets cyberpunk aesthetic, Dunhuang mural mineral pigment colors, dominant palette: #2E8B57 #F0E68C #E34234 #DDA0DD #1C1C3A, cinematic composition, 4K, 16:9 widescreen. No text, no watermark.
panels.narration: 石青、石绿、赭黄、胭脂、鸦青、月白、丹砂、藤黄、烟紫。九条色带从渊心向外旋，慢得像磨盘碾豆。色带之间不混。
panels.notes: Painterly quality. The colors should feel like actual mineral pigments, not digital gradients.

panels.description_cn: 中景：四面青绿色的山围着渊。石青石绿直接拍在岩壁上，浓得发假。云卡在山腰，银灰色，像千年旧绷带勒出石头骨节。风从东山翻到西山，绕过渊面。
panels.prompt: Wide shot of an ancient circular pool encircled by four towering mountains. The mountain surfaces are painted in thick mineral green and blue pigments (#2E8B57), unnaturally vivid, as if applied directly with a giant brush — no blending, no gradation, the color drips down the rock face and stops where solid silver-grey clouds grip the mountainsides like ancient bandages wrapping stone bones. Wind visualized as faint silver streaks arcing over the mountain ridges, deliberately avoiding the pool surface. The pool below is perfectly undisturbed. The atmosphere is ancient, primordial, impossibly still. Chinese ink wash painting meets cyberpunk aesthetic, Dunhuang mural mineral pigment colors, dominant palette: #2E8B57 #B0C4DE #1C1C3A, cinematic composition, 4K, 16:9 widescreen. No text, no watermark.
panels.narration: 山围着渊。风吹不动它。连风都绕着走。
panels.notes: Emphasize the unnatural stillness. This place has been waiting.

panels.description_cn: 渊心特写。色带转了无数圈后，旋心处的水开始有了质感——厚的，温吞的，能托住东西的稠度。画面极简，只有旋涡中心在微微发亮。
panels.prompt: Close-up of the exact center of the spiral pool. The nine color bands converge to a single point. The water at the center has become thick, viscous, almost gelatinous — you can sense it could hold weight. A faint warmth emanates from the depths. The spiral is hypnotic, ancient, patient. The center begins to glow with the faintest hint of gold, barely perceptible. Absolute stillness surrounds it. Dark background at edges fading to the rich colors at center. Chinese ink wash painting meets cyberpunk aesthetic, Dunhuang mural mineral pigment colors, dominant palette: #FFBF00 #1C1C3A #3CB371, cinematic composition, 4K, 16:9 widescreen. No text, no watermark.
panels.narration: 安静。安静了很久。旋心处的水开始有了质感。厚的，温吞的，能托住东西的那种稠。
panels.notes: Build tension through stillness. The glow is barely visible — viewer leans in.

panels.description_cn: 渊心水下三丈深处，一个金色光点亮起。很小，像有人在水底划了一根火柴，又像有人闭着眼睛笑了一下、笑意从牙齿缝里漏出来一点光。
panels.prompt: Underwater view looking down into dark depths of the pool. A single golden point of light ignites three meters below the surface, tiny as a matchstrike, warm as a smile. The gold light filters upward through layers of colored water — green, yellow, blue, purple tinting the light as it rises. The surrounding water is dark and deep. The golden point is the only source of warmth in an ancient, patient darkness. The light has an organic quality — not a flame, but something alive, like joy leaking through closed eyelids. Chinese ink wash painting meets cyberpunk aesthetic, Dunhuang mural mineral pigment colors, dominant palette: #FFBF00 #1C1C3A #3CB371 #87CEEB, cinematic composition, 4K, 16:9 widescreen. No text, no watermark.
panels.narration: 然后渊心亮了一下。很小。一个金色的点。有人在水底划了一根火柴。
panels.notes: First hint of Mailo. The gold = her smile = lingji.

panels.description_cn: 金光从指甲盖大小迅速扩成一整片。九条色带同时停住——像被人摁住了磨盘——然后朝金光方向聚拢，石青裹着赭黄，胭脂压着月白，颜色浓得快要滴下来。
panels.prompt: Dynamic overhead shot of the pool surface. A golden light expands rapidly from center — fingernail size to fist to a flood of gold. All nine color bands freeze simultaneously as if a giant hand pressed the millstone still. Then the bands rush inward toward the gold, layering on top of each other: mineral blue wrapping ochre yellow, carmine pressing down on moon white. Colors intensifying, thickening, almost dripping with saturation. The spiral collapses inward in a magnificent convergence of color. Energy building, the surface beginning to bulge upward. Chinese ink wash painting meets cyberpunk aesthetic, Dunhuang mural mineral pigment colors, dominant palette: #FFBF00 #3CB371 #E34234 #F0E68C #DDA0DD, cinematic composition, 4K, 16:9 widescreen. No text, no watermark.
panels.narration: 金光涌出来的一瞬，九条色带同时停住了。然后它们往金光的方向聚拢。颜色浓得快要滴下来。
panels.notes: Dynamic energy. The nine colors losing their discipline for the first time in eons.

panels.description_cn: 水下模糊的特写：在色彩交汇的涡旋深处，隐约能看到一个笑容的轮廓——先是嘴角弧度，然后眼角，然后整张脸。九色随笑容的弧度同步缠绕。
panels.prompt: Underwater abstract composition. Through layers of swirling color — emerald green, amber orange, sky blue, light purple — the ghostly suggestion of a smile forms. First the curve of lips, then the crinkle of eyes, then a face taking shape within the chromatic vortex. The nine colors wrap tighter as the smile widens, spiraling in synchrony with the arc of joy. Everything is soft, blurred by water, dreamlike. The smile is the source of all the color and warmth. Liquid aurora effect — light passing through colored water layers creating flowing chromatic patterns. Chinese ink wash painting meets cyberpunk aesthetic, Dunhuang mural mineral pigment colors, dominant palette: #FFBF00 #3CB371 #FFBF00 #DDA0DD #87CEEB, cinematic composition, 4K, 16:9 widescreen. No text, no watermark.
panels.narration: 渊底有什么东西在笑。九色朝着那笑意涌去。色带缠绕的速度和笑容的弧度同步。
panels.notes: Abstract, impressionistic. We feel the smile before we see the person.

panels.description_cn: 全章最重要的画面之一。水面裂开一道缝，一个女孩从九色水里渗出来。黑头发贴着脸，眼睛闭着，嘴角翘着——她在笑。五色水珠从发梢滑落。她是光源。
panels.prompt: A 14-year-old Chinese girl emerges from the surface of a nine-colored mystical pool. Her long black hair is plastered to her face and fans out in the water around her. Her eyes are closed but her lips curve into a serene smile — she is the source of all the color. Five different colored water droplets slide from her hair tips, each refracting a different hue of the spectrum. The water parts around her body like curtains being drawn open. Orange-red, golden yellow, pale green colors radiate outward from her body in concentric rings. She wears a damp grey-blue short jacket with oversized sleeves. The mountains frame the background, jade-green with silver cloud bands. This is a birth scene — she is the new axis of this world. Chinese ink wash painting meets cyberpunk aesthetic, Dunhuang mural mineral pigment colors, dominant palette: #FFBF00 #3CB371 #F0E68C #87CEEB #DDA0DD, cinematic composition, 4K, 16:9 widescreen. No text, no watermark.
panels.narration: 水面裂开一道缝，一个女孩从九色水里渗了出来。黑头发贴着脸。眼睛闭着。嘴角翘着。她在笑。
panels.notes: SPLASH PANEL. The key visual of the entire chapter. Birth/emergence motif. She is the new center.

panels.description_cn: 俯视角：麦洛仰浮在水面上，头发散开在九色水里铺成扇面。湿衣服贴在身上，灰蓝色短褂。她是新的轴心，九条色带全朝她转。
panels.prompt: Top-down bird's eye view of a 14-year-old Chinese girl floating on her back in a pool of nine swirling colors. Her long black hair fans out around her head like a dark halo, spreading across the colored water. She wears a wet grey-blue short jacket with sleeves too long, covering her fingers. The nine color bands have reorganized — they all spiral around her body now, she has become their new axis. Orange, gold, pale green ripple outward from her torso. Her face is peaceful, eyes still closed, the hint of a smile. The surrounding mountains and sky reflected in the water around her. She is tiny in the vastness of the pool but she is undeniably its center. Chinese ink wash painting meets cyberpunk aesthetic, Dunhuang mural mineral pigment colors, dominant palette: #3CB371 #FFBF00 #87CEEB #F0E68C #DDA0DD, cinematic composition, 4K, 16:9 widescreen. No text, no watermark.
panels.narration: 她仰浮在水面上。头发散开，在九色水里铺成一个扇面。九条色带不再各走各的了，全朝着她转。
panels.notes: Iconic overhead composition. She is the center of a living mandala.

panels.description_cn: 麦洛睁开眼睛的特写。头顶是过分干净的蓝天。光打在水面上被五色折射成碎片，落在她脸上一块金一块绿。她眯了一下眼。
panels.prompt: Extreme close-up of a 14-year-old Chinese girl's face as she opens her eyes for the first time. Above her is an impossibly clean blue sky with no clouds, only pure light. The light refracts through the colored water surface and falls on her face in fragments — a patch of gold on her cheek, a stripe of green across her forehead, blue light dancing across her nose. Water droplets cling to her eyelashes. Her eyes are wide, taking in everything. She squints slightly against the brightness. Her expression shifts from peaceful sleep to awakening wonder. Black hair wet against her temples. Chinese ink wash painting meets cyberpunk aesthetic, Dunhuang mural mineral pigment colors, dominant palette: #FFBF00 #3CB371 #87CEEB #F0E68C, cinematic composition, 4K, 16:9 widescreen. No text, no watermark.
panels.narration: 然后她睁开眼睛。头顶是天。蓝得过分干净的天。光打在水面上，被五色折射成碎片，落在她脸上，一块金一块绿。
panels.notes: Intimate moment. The fractured light on her face = the world painting her.

panels.description_cn: 极致特写：麦洛的眼睛。两三秒内，她的眼神不对——不是十二岁的眼神，是一个走了很远的路的人在陌生路口辨认方向的眼神。瞳孔在对焦、搜索、匹配不属于这副身体的记忆。然后好奇心从下面顶上来，盖住了那个眼神。
panels.prompt: Extreme macro close-up of a young girl's eyes — but the expression within them belongs to someone much older. The pupils are contracting, searching, scanning — the gaze of a traveler at an unfamiliar crossroads, trying to match memories that don't belong to this body. For a fleeting moment, these are adult eyes in a child's face — weary, knowing, dislocated. Then a wave of curiosity rises from below, youthful wonder flooding back in, the ancient gaze sinking beneath the surface like a stone dropping into water. The iris reflects the nine colors of the pool. Colored light fragments dance across the eye surface. The transition from old soul to young wonder happens in a single breath. Chinese ink wash painting meets cyberpunk aesthetic, Dunhuang mural mineral pigment colors, dominant palette: #FFBF00 #87CEEB #3CB371 #1C1C3A, cinematic composition, 4K, 16:9 widescreen. No text, no watermark.
panels.narration: 有一瞬——很短，两三秒——她的眼神不对。不是十二岁的眼神。是一个走了很远的路的人站在陌生路口辨认方向的眼神。然后好奇心从下面顶上来，把那个眼神盖住了。
panels.notes: CRITICAL PANEL. The first clue that Mailo is not who she appears to be. The adult-in-child's-body mystery. Hold this shot long enough for viewers to feel uneasy.

panels.description_cn: 麦洛试着在水中站起来。水到腰，脚踩渊底卵石，石头圆滑硌脚心。她迈了一步重心不稳，膝盖磕在凸出的石头上。
panels.prompt: Medium shot of a 14-year-old Chinese girl standing waist-deep in nine-colored water. She is trying to find her balance on smooth round stones at the bottom. Her legs are unsteady, knees slightly bent. One knee bumps against a protruding stone — a wince of pain crosses her face. Water swirls around her waist in bands of color. Her grey-blue jacket is soaked, sleeves hanging past her hands. She looks down at her own body with an expression of confused unfamiliarity. Mountains and jade-green cliffs form the backdrop. Chinese ink wash painting meets cyberpunk aesthetic, Dunhuang mural mineral pigment colors, dominant palette: #3CB371 #F0E68C #87CEEB #2E8B57, cinematic composition, 4K, 16:9 widescreen. No text, no watermark.
panels.narration: 她试着站。水到腰。脚踩在渊底的卵石上，石头是圆的，滑，硌脚心。
panels.notes: Physical comedy meets existential displacement. She doesn't fit this body yet.

panels.description_cn: 麦洛把两只手从水里捞出来，翻过来看。手太小了——指节细，掌纹浅，指甲是圆的，是小孩的手。她攥拳，松开，攥，松开。
panels.prompt: Close-up of two small hands held up against the light, dripping with colored water. These are a child's hands — slender fingers, shallow palm lines, round nails neatly trimmed. Drops of green, gold, and blue water slide down the wrists. The hands clench into fists, then open, then clench again — testing, verifying, confused. Behind the hands, the blurred nine-colored pool and jade mountains. The hands are too small for the consciousness behind them. Water droplets catch light and refract into tiny rainbows. Chinese ink wash painting meets cyberpunk aesthetic, Dunhuang mural mineral pigment colors, dominant palette: #F0E68C #3CB371 #87CEEB #F0EAD6, cinematic composition, 4K, 16:9 widescreen. No text, no watermark.
panels.narration: 手太小了。指节细，掌纹浅，指甲是圆的，是小孩的手。她攥了一下拳，松开，攥，松开。
panels.notes: The body doesn't match the soul. Second clue for the viewer.

panels.description_cn: 麦洛低头看着自己的手，说出第一句话。声音嫩、薄、带水呛过的沙，但底下还有一层不属于这个年纪的沉。
panels.prompt: Medium close-up of a 14-year-old Chinese girl standing waist-deep in colored water, looking down at her own hands with a puzzled frown. Her lips part slightly to speak. Water drips from her black hair. Her expression combines childlike confusion with a deeper, older bewilderment — as if she expected different hands. The nine-colored pool surrounds her, soft light reflecting off the water onto her face. Mountains in soft focus behind. Chinese ink wash painting meets cyberpunk aesthetic, Dunhuang mural mineral pigment colors, dominant palette: #3CB371 #87CEEB #F0E68C, cinematic composition, 4K, 16:9 widescreen. No text, no watermark.
panels.narration: 声音也不对。嫩，薄，但底下还有一层不属于这个年纪的沉。
panels.notes: First words spoken in the entire story. Should feel significant.

panels.description_cn: 麦洛淌水上岸。脚踩上青石时水从脚趾缝挤出来，凉的。但石头是温的——从内部烘出来的热，从地底顶上来。
panels.prompt: Low angle shot of bare feet stepping onto moss-covered shore stones from colored water. Water squeezes out between toes, droplets of emerald and amber. The stone surface is warm — faint heat waves rise from within the rock itself. Thin moss grows on the stones but stops precisely at the waterline in a perfectly straight edge. The girl's feet are small, delicate, leaving wet footprints on the warm stone. The water behind shimmers in nine colors. Chinese ink wash painting meets cyberpunk aesthetic, Dunhuang mural mineral pigment colors, dominant palette: #2E8B57 #3CB371 #FFBF00 #F0EAD6, cinematic composition, 4K, 16:9 widescreen. No text, no watermark.
panels.narration: 她淌水上岸。石头是温的。不是太阳晒的温，是从石头内部烘出来的热。
panels.notes: Sensory detail. The world is alive and warm — welcoming her.

panels.description_cn: 麦洛蹲在岸边，把手伸进水里。水缠上来——不是流过，是缠。五色水顺着指缝钻进去，一根手指一根手指地裹。
panels.prompt: Close-up of a girl's hand submerged in nine-colored water at the shore edge. The water does not flow past — it wraps. Five colors of water thread between her fingers like living silk: green crawls along the bone ridges, yellow follows the tendons, blue traces the veins, light purple coils around the wrist pulse point pulsing with her heartbeat, orange-red lazily wraps around the ring finger three times and stays. The water measures her, finger by finger, joint by joint. A faint tremor of energy visible as tiny light particles along the skin. The girl's face reflected in the water watches with fascination. Chinese ink wash painting meets cyberpunk aesthetic, Dunhuang mural mineral pigment colors, dominant palette: #3CB371 #F0E68C #87CEEB #DDA0DD #FFBF00, cinematic composition, 4K, 16:9 widescreen. No text, no watermark.
panels.narration: 水缠上来了。不是流过——是缠。五色的水顺着指缝钻进去，一根手指一根手指地裹。像在量尺寸。
panels.notes: First lingji interaction. The water is sentient. Intimate, almost tender.

panels.description_cn: 麦洛把手往水里探深一寸。水从手腕缠到小臂，得到允许后反而不急了。碧绿走骨缝，鹅黄走筋络，天蓝走血管，淡紫盘在手腕脉搏上随心跳明灭，橘红绕无名指转三圈赖着不动。
panels.prompt: Detailed close-up of a girl's forearm submerged to the elbow in colored water. Five distinct colors trace different paths on her skin like living tattoos: emerald green (#3CB371) follows bone ridges, goose yellow (#F0E68C) follows tendons, sky blue (#87CEEB) traces blood vessels beneath the skin, light purple (#DDA0DD) coils around the wrist at the pulse point — pulsing brighter and dimmer in sync with heartbeats. Orange-red (#FFBF00) has wrapped three lazy loops around the ring finger and stopped, refusing to move. The colors glow faintly against her skin. The water around the arm has become gentle, unhurried — permission was granted. Chinese ink wash painting meets cyberpunk aesthetic, Dunhuang mural mineral pigment colors, dominant palette: #3CB371 #F0E68C #87CEEB #DDA0DD #FFBF00, cinematic composition, 4K, 16:9 widescreen. No text, no watermark.
panels.narration: 碧绿走骨缝，鹅黄走筋络，天蓝走血管，淡紫盘在手腕的脉搏上随着心跳明灭。橘红的那一道最懒，绕着无名指转了三圈，不动了。
panels.notes: LINGJI VISUALIZATION. Each color = emotion frequency. This is the visual signature of the world's magic system.

panels.description_cn: 麦洛看着手臂上的五色水纹。说了一个字：好看。水听见了——五色亮了一下，亮度和她嘴角翘起的弧度一致。
panels.prompt: Medium close-up of a 14-year-old Chinese girl kneeling at the water's edge, looking at her own forearm covered in five glowing color trails. A gentle smile on her lips. The moment she speaks, all five colors on her arm pulse brighter simultaneously — the brightness matching the exact curve of her smile. The pool surface near her also brightens in response. Her expression is pure, simple wonder — a child finding something beautiful. Warm ambient light. The jade mountains reflected softly in the background water. Chinese ink wash painting meets cyberpunk aesthetic, Dunhuang mural mineral pigment colors, dominant palette: #3CB371 #F0E68C #FFBF00 #87CEEB #DDA0DD, cinematic composition, 4K, 16:9 widescreen. No text, no watermark.
panels.narration: 水听见了。五色亮了一下，亮度和她说话时嘴角翘起的弧度一致。
panels.notes: The world responds to her emotions. Lingji = liquid emotion field.

panels.description_cn: 她把手从水里抽出来。水不舍得放，拉出一根一根五色的丝，从指尖到水面，细得发亮，撑了两秒，断了。断的时候发出极轻的声音——像蛛丝绷断，或有人在远处弹了一下琴弦。
panels.prompt: Close-up of a hand being slowly pulled from colored water. Thin luminous threads of five colors stretch from fingertips down to the water surface — gossamer-thin, glowing, reluctant to let go. The threads catch the light like spider silk made of liquid color: green, yellow, blue, purple, orange-red. They stretch thinner and thinner, holding for two heartbeats, then snap one by one. Tiny sparks fly at each breaking point. The moment of breaking is beautiful and slightly sad — like plucking a harp string. Water droplets suspended in the threads fall back to the surface creating tiny colored ripples. Chinese ink wash painting meets cyberpunk aesthetic, Dunhuang mural mineral pigment colors, dominant palette: #3CB371 #F0E68C #87CEEB #DDA0DD #FFBF00, cinematic composition, 4K, 16:9 widescreen. No text, no watermark.
panels.narration: 水不舍得放，拉出一根一根的丝，五色的丝，细得发亮。撑了两秒，断了。断的时候发出极轻的声音。
panels.notes: Beautiful micro-moment. The water has feelings. Sound design: faint harp string.

panels.description_cn: 麦洛站起来面朝渊。水面已恢复——九条色带重新分开各归各道。但水面留了一层薄薄的光没散尽。她能看见自己的倒影：一个湿漉漉的、黑头发的、太小了的女孩。
panels.prompt: Medium wide shot of a 14-year-old Chinese girl standing at the edge of the pool, facing the water. Her wet reflection stares back at her from the nine-colored surface. The color bands have resumed their slow independent spiral. A thin layer of residual glow clings to the water like a dream that won't leave. She is small against the vastness of the pool and the encircling jade mountains. Her reflection is clear — a dripping wet, black-haired girl who is too small. She stares at herself for a long time. Wind-still. Chinese ink wash painting meets cyberpunk aesthetic, Dunhuang mural mineral pigment colors, dominant palette: #3CB371 #F0E68C #2E8B57 #B0C4DE #1C1C3A, cinematic composition, 4K, 16:9 widescreen. No text, no watermark.
panels.narration: 水面留了一层薄薄的光没散尽。她能看见自己的倒影了。一个湿漉漉的、黑头发的、太小了的女孩。
panels.notes: Contemplative moment. She is confronting the gap between who she feels she is and what she sees.

panels.description_cn: 风来了。第一阵风。从北边山谷穿过云层和竹林，带着青涩的竹叶微苦气味。风过水面，倒影碎了一下又拼回来。
panels.prompt: Wide establishing shot. Wind sweeps down from northern mountain valleys, visualized as silver-white streaks carrying tiny green bamboo leaf fragments. The wind passes over cloud layers wrapped around mountain waists, through suggested bamboo forest canopy in the distance. On the pool surface, the reflection of the girl standing at the shore shatters momentarily into colored fragments, then reassembles. Her wet hair lifts slightly. The bamboo forest is visible in the far background — dense green tips poking above the cloud layer. Fresh spring atmosphere. Chinese ink wash painting meets cyberpunk aesthetic, Dunhuang mural mineral pigment colors, dominant palette: #2E8B57 #3CB371 #B0C4DE #228B22, cinematic composition, 4K, 16:9 widescreen. No text, no watermark.
panels.narration: 风来了。第一阵风。从北边的山谷里来，带着青涩的气味。竹叶的味道，微苦。
panels.notes: First sign of the wider world beyond the pool. Foreshadows Yaolin (Ch2).

panels.description_cn: 麦洛对着水面的倒影说话。她的表情复杂——不是小孩在玩水的表情，是在辨认一个不太对的自己。
panels.prompt: Over-the-shoulder shot looking down at the pool surface. We see Mailo's reflection in the nine-colored water — a 14-year-old Chinese girl with wet black hair, staring up at herself. The real girl's shadow falls across part of the reflection. The expression in the reflection is complex — not a child at play but someone recognizing something wrong. The nine color bands slowly spiral around the reflection. The girl's lips move. Jade-green mountain reflections frame the edges of the water. Chinese ink wash painting meets cyberpunk aesthetic, Dunhuang mural mineral pigment colors, dominant palette: #3CB371 #1C1C3A #87CEEB #F0E68C, cinematic composition, 4K, 16:9 widescreen. No text, no watermark.
panels.narration: 安静了两秒。
panels.notes: Key mystery dialogue. She REMEMBERS being taller. Third clue for the viewer. The pause between lines is important.

panels.description_cn: 内心描写的视觉化：她记得自己更大——不是身高，是在世界里占的位置更大。桌子、椅子、窗台、尺子的残影像透过毛玻璃一样闪过。她是这个世界的第一道刻痕，但刻痕太浅。
panels.prompt: Abstract montage composition. In the foreground, the small silhouette of a 14-year-old girl standing at a pool's edge. Behind her, like ghosts seen through frosted glass, fragmented memories float: the edge of a desk, the back of a chair, a window sill with a height-measuring ruler — all translucent, fading, from another life. These memory fragments are rendered in warm sepia tones contrasting with the cool nine-colored present. The girl is the first scratch on a blank world — but the scratch is faint, almost invisible. Wind could erase it. The pool's colors reflect upward, casting the memory fragments in chromatic light. Chinese ink wash painting meets cyberpunk aesthetic, Dunhuang mural mineral pigment colors, dominant palette: #FFBF00 #87CEEB #1C1C3A #B0C4DE, cinematic composition, 4K, 16:9 widescreen. No text, no watermark.
panels.narration: 她记得自己更大。不是身高的大。是在世界里占的位置更大。此刻她站在一片水的旁边，什么都没有标记过她。她是这个世界的第一道刻痕。但刻痕太浅了。
panels.notes: Memory fragments from her 18-year-old life bleeding through. Sepia vs. nine-color contrast.

panels.description_cn: 麦洛转身背对渊面，开始拧头发里的水。黑头发绞成一股绳，水从发梢滴落在石头上，啪嗒啪嗒。她拧得很用力，手指发白。
panels.prompt: Medium shot from behind of a 14-year-old Chinese girl wringing water from her long black hair. She has turned her back to the pool. Her hair is twisted into a tight rope, water droplets falling onto the warm stone — each drop darkening a small circle on the rock surface. Her fingers grip hard, knuckles turning white from the effort. She wrings with more force than necessary — channeling something. Behind her, the nine-colored pool continues its slow spiral, indifferent. The jade mountains and silver clouds form a serene backdrop contrasting with her intense action. Chinese ink wash painting meets cyberpunk aesthetic, Dunhuang mural mineral pigment colors, dominant palette: #1C1C3A #2E8B57 #3CB371 #B0C4DE, cinematic composition, 4K, 16:9 widescreen. No text, no watermark.
panels.narration: 她转过身，背对渊面，开始拧头发里的水。她拧得很用力，拧到手指发白。
panels.notes: Her back is to the pool — she can't see what's about to happen. Tension building.

panels.description_cn: 身后水面动了。不是风，不是水滴，是从渊底有什么东西往上浮。慢。带着不需要赶时间的耐心。水面微微隆起，五色水从隆起顶部往四周淌。
panels.prompt: Wide shot of the nine-colored pool with the girl's back in the foreground, still wringing her hair. Behind her, the center of the pool begins to bulge upward — a slow, patient dome of water rising. Five colored streams slide down the sides of the growing mound. The rise is unhurried, ancient, as if whatever is beneath has all of eternity. The pool surface distorts, the spiral pattern warping around the rising mass. The mountains watch. The clouds watch. Everything holds its breath. The girl is unaware, her back turned. Chinese ink wash painting meets cyberpunk aesthetic, Dunhuang mural mineral pigment colors, dominant palette: #3CB371 #F0E68C #87CEEB #DDA0DD #FFBF00, cinematic composition, 4K, 16:9 widescreen. No text, no watermark.
panels.narration: 身后的水面动了。渊底有东西在往上浮。慢。带着一种不紧不慢的、不需要赶时间的耐心。
panels.notes: Dramatic irony — we see it, she doesn't. Build dread slowly.

panels.description_cn: 水面裂开。不是炸开，是分开。五色水从中间往两侧退，整整齐齐，像一双看不见的手从中间拉开帷幕。
panels.prompt: Dramatic wide shot of the pool surface splitting open. The water parts from the center outward in perfect symmetry — not exploding but parting, like invisible hands drawing curtains. Five-colored water retreats to each side in orderly waves. The split reveals darkness below — an impossibly deep void. The parting water catches light on its edges, creating two walls of liquid color flanking a growing chasm of black. The scale is enormous. The girl at the shore edge is tiny. Chinese ink wash painting meets cyberpunk aesthetic, Dunhuang mural mineral pigment colors, dominant palette: #1C1C3A #3CB371 #FFBF00 #DDA0DD #87CEEB, cinematic composition, 4K, 16:9 widescreen. No text, no watermark.
panels.narration: 水面裂开。不是炸开，是分开。一双看不见的手从中间拉开帷幕。
panels.notes: Biblical parting-of-waters imagery. The scale shift begins.

panels.description_cn: 核心高潮画面。水面退开后露出一只巨大的竖瞳眼睛。每一侧都比麦洛的身体宽。瞳仁是竖的，里面流着五色：碧绿顺时针，鹅黄逆时针，天蓝不转但在明灭，淡紫和橘红绕着彼此缠。眼白是黑的。
panels.prompt: SPLASH PANEL — Full spread. An enormous vertical-slit eye emerges from the parted waters of the nine-colored pool. Each half of the eye is wider than a human body. The pupil is vertical, and within it five colors flow in different patterns: emerald green (#3CB371) rotates clockwise, goose yellow (#F0E68C) rotates counter-clockwise, sky blue (#87CEEB) doesn't rotate but pulses bright and dark, light purple (#DDA0DD) and amber orange (#FFBF00) spiral around each other in a double helix. The sclera is pure black (#1C1C3A), the same black as the deepest water. The eye is ancient, vast, knowing. Parted walls of colored water flank it on both sides. A tiny silhouette of a girl stands at the shore in the lower corner for scale. This is a god looking up from beneath. Chinese ink wash painting meets cyberpunk aesthetic, Dunhuang mural mineral pigment colors, dominant palette: #3CB371 #F0E68C #87CEEB #DDA0DD #FFBF00 #1C1C3A, cinematic composition, 4K, 16:9 widescreen. No text, no watermark.
panels.narration: 露出一只眼睛。竖瞳。每一侧都比她的身体宽。
panels.notes: CLIMAX SPLASH. The most visually striking panel. Scale is everything. The eye should fill most of the frame.

panels.description_cn: 麦洛转过身。她看见了。没有尖叫，没有后退，没有呼吸变急。她只是站在那里，湿头发搭在肩上滴着水，两只手还保持着拧头发的姿势。
panels.prompt: Medium shot of a 14-year-old Chinese girl who has just turned around to face the enormous eye in the pool. Her wet hair drapes over one shoulder, still dripping. Her hands are frozen in mid-air, still in the wringing position. Her expression is not fear — it is absolute stillness. No screaming, no stepping back, no quickened breath. Just a small girl standing before something impossibly vast, meeting its gaze with simple calm. The massive five-colored vertical pupil reflects in her dark eyes. Water drops fall from her hair in slow motion. Chinese ink wash painting meets cyberpunk aesthetic, Dunhuang mural mineral pigment colors, dominant palette: #3CB371 #FFBF00 #1C1C3A #87CEEB, cinematic composition, 4K, 16:9 widescreen. No text, no watermark.
panels.narration: 麦洛转过身。她看见了。没有尖叫。没有后退。她只是站在那里。
panels.notes: Her lack of fear defines her character. She is not ordinary.

panels.description_cn: 那只眼睛看着她。不是看——是看穿。目光从她胸口进去，在里面转了一圈，摸了摸肋骨，数了数心跳，从后背出来。麦洛感觉到胸腔里一阵温热，像一只大手掌按在胸口。
panels.prompt: Split composition. Left side: extreme close-up of the enormous vertical pupil with five colors swirling within — the eye's gaze is focused, penetrating. Right side: the girl's torso, with a warm golden-amber glow emanating from her chest as if something is looking through her from inside. Translucent light traces from the eye pass through her body — entering at the chest, circling her ribs, counting heartbeats visible as rhythmic pulses of warm light, then exiting through her back. Her expression shows not pain but pressure — the sensation of a large warm palm pressed against her sternum. The connection between eye and girl is rendered as flowing threads of colored light. Chinese ink wash painting meets cyberpunk aesthetic, Dunhuang mural mineral pigment colors, dominant palette: #FFBF00 #1C1C3A #3CB371 #DDA0DD, cinematic composition, 4K, 16:9 widescreen. No text, no watermark.
panels.narration: 不是看。是看穿。目光从她胸口进去，在里面转了一圈。麦洛感觉到了——胸腔里一阵温热，是一只手掌按在胸口的压力感。
panels.notes: Mystical connection. The eye is reading her. The warmth is paternal — a father's hand on a daughter's heart.

panels.description_cn: 持续三秒后，那只眼睛的目光移开了。移得很平淡——一页翻过去，书页甚至没有声响。
panels.prompt: Close-up of the enormous five-colored vertical pupil slowly shifting its gaze away. The movement is casual, unhurried — like turning a page in a book without sound. The five colors within the pupil continue their independent rotations but the focus point drifts from the girl to somewhere beyond. The black sclera gleams like deep water. There is something almost dismissive in the ease of the gesture — or perhaps something protective, like looking away to spare her from being seen too deeply. The colored water walls flanking the eye begin to tremble slightly. Chinese ink wash painting meets cyberpunk aesthetic, Dunhuang mural mineral pigment colors, dominant palette: #1C1C3A #3CB371 #F0E68C #FFBF00, cinematic composition, 4K, 16:9 widescreen. No text, no watermark.
panels.narration: 然后那只眼睛的目光移开了。移得很平淡。一页翻过去，书页甚至没有声响。
panels.notes: The eye has seen her and found her... not quite what it expected. But not disappointed.

panels.description_cn: 麦洛举起手，冲那只巨大的眼睛挥了挥，说了声你好——一个小女孩对一个神明般存在的最自然的反应。
panels.prompt: Wide shot showing the scale contrast: a small 14-year-old girl standing at the shore, raising one hand and waving at the enormous five-colored eye that fills half the pool surface. Her wave is casual, friendly, unafraid — as natural as greeting a neighbor. Her wet hair swings with the motion. The eye, vast and ancient with its black sclera and five-colored vertical pupil, faces her. The absurd scale difference between the tiny waving girl and the cosmic eye creates a simultaneously humorous and profound composition. Mountains and silver clouds frame the scene. Chinese ink wash painting meets cyberpunk aesthetic, Dunhuang mural mineral pigment colors, dominant palette: #3CB371 #FFBF00 #1C1C3A #87CEEB, cinematic composition, 4K, 16:9 widescreen. No text, no watermark.
panels.notes: Character-defining moment. Her instinct is friendliness, not fear. This is who Mailo is.

panels.description_cn: 没有回声。水面涟漪不是散开——是收回去。一封寄出去的信自己走回了信封。涟漪从渊的边缘往中间退，一圈一圈缩小。
panels.prompt: Top-down view of the pool surface. Ripples move in reverse — from the outer edges of the pool inward toward the center, shrinking ring by ring. Each ripple carries traces of color that converge on the great eye. The effect is uncanny, like watching a letter return itself to its envelope, like time running backwards. The ripples contract with mathematical precision, each ring smaller and tighter. The eye at the center absorbs them silently. The surrounding mountains are reflected in the remaining calm water. Chinese ink wash painting meets cyberpunk aesthetic, Dunhuang mural mineral pigment colors, dominant palette: #3CB371 #F0E68C #87CEEB #1C1C3A, cinematic composition, 4K, 16:9 widescreen. No text, no watermark.
panels.narration: 涟漪不是散开——是收回去。一封寄出去的信自己走回了信封。
panels.notes: Physics run backwards. This world has its own rules.

panels.description_cn: 眼睛闭上了。竖瞳合拢的速度很慢，像日落。最后一线光从瞳缝里挤出来——是橘红色的——然后灭了。它沉下去。水面从两侧合拢，九色重新铺平。
panels.prompt: Close-up of the enormous vertical pupil slowly closing. The eyelid descends with the pace of a sunset. The five-colored patterns within compress as the slit narrows. The last sliver of light to escape is amber-orange (#FFBF00), squeezing through the closing gap like the final ray of sun at the horizon — then extinguished. The black sclera disappears as the parted waters rush back together from both sides, colored bands reforming, the pool surface sealing shut. Everything returns to the slow spiral. As if nothing happened. The glow fades. Darkness reclaims the depths. Chinese ink wash painting meets cyberpunk aesthetic, Dunhuang mural mineral pigment colors, dominant palette: #FFBF00 #1C1C3A #3CB371 #DDA0DD, cinematic composition, 4K, 16:9 widescreen. No text, no watermark.
panels.narration: 眼睛闭上了。竖瞳合拢的速度很慢，像日落。最后一线光从瞳缝里挤出来——是橘红色的——然后灭了。
panels.notes: The sunset metaphor is deliberate. Something ancient going back to sleep. The orange = lingji heartbeat color.

panels.description_cn: 渊面恢复原状。九条色带各归各位。麦洛蹲回去歪着头看水面——水底什么都看不见了，只有自己的倒影。
panels.prompt: Wide shot of the pool returned to its original state — nine color bands spiraling slowly, independently. A 14-year-old girl crouches at the shore, head tilted to one side, peering into the water. Her reflection stares back at her. The depths below are opaque, revealing nothing. The scene is exactly as it was before the eye appeared. Peaceful. Undisturbed. As if nothing happened. But the girl knows something happened. Her posture is curious, not afraid. Jade mountains, silver clouds, warm stone — all serene. Chinese ink wash painting meets cyberpunk aesthetic, Dunhuang mural mineral pigment colors, dominant palette: #3CB371 #F0E68C #2E8B57 #B0C4DE, cinematic composition, 4K, 16:9 widescreen. No text, no watermark.
panels.narration: 什么都没发生过。麦洛蹲回去，歪着头看水面。只有她自己的倒影。
panels.notes: Reset. The world pretends nothing happened.

panels.description_cn: 麦洛蹲在岸边对着水底说话。倒影也盯着她的眼睛看。
panels.prompt: Low angle close-up of a 14-year-old girl crouching at the water's edge, her face close to the surface, speaking downward to the depths. Her reflection in the nine-colored water stares back up at her. Her expression is gentle, unafraid, almost affectionate — talking to something vast as if it were a large but gentle animal. Water laps gently at the stone. Her wet hair hangs forward, tips touching the water surface. Chinese ink wash painting meets cyberpunk aesthetic, Dunhuang mural mineral pigment colors, dominant palette: #3CB371 #F0E68C #1C1C3A #87CEEB, cinematic composition, 4K, 16:9 widescreen. No text, no watermark.
panels.narration: 水没有回应。
panels.notes: Charming and brave. She sees a god and calls it 'big but not mean.'

panels.description_cn: 她站起来拍了拍膝盖上的水，啪的一声清脆。吸了口气，竹子的青涩凉意从鼻腔走到胸腔。
panels.prompt: Medium shot of a 14-year-old Chinese girl standing up from a crouch, briskly patting water off her knees with a sharp clap. Her expression is resolute, reset — moving on. She takes a deep breath, chest expanding. Faint green-tinted air currents visualized as the scent of bamboo travels from the northern mountains to her nostrils. Her wet grey-blue jacket, bare feet on warm stone. The pool behind her in soft focus. She is collecting herself, preparing. Chinese ink wash painting meets cyberpunk aesthetic, Dunhuang mural mineral pigment colors, dominant palette: #228B22 #3CB371 #2E8B57 #B0C4DE, cinematic composition, 4K, 16:9 widescreen. No text, no watermark.
panels.narration: 她站起来，拍了拍膝盖上的水。吸了口气，竹子的味道从鼻腔走到胸腔。
panels.notes: Transition beat. She's processing and moving forward.

panels.description_cn: 有什么东西蹭她脚踝。低头——一只银色的猫，巴掌大，三条尾巴，正用脑袋蹭她的脚踝骨。蹭一下，抬头看一眼，再蹭一下。
panels.prompt: Close-up at ground level of bare feet on warm stone. A tiny palm-sized silver-white cat-like creature rubs its head against the girl's ankle bone. The creature has three tails, short silver fur with a faint blue sheen (#B0C4DE), and pointed ears with white fur tufts at the tips. It rubs once, looks up with amber eyes, rubs again. Its movement is deliberate — rubbing for warmth, checking for reaction, rubbing again. The girl's feet are wet, small. The creature is impossibly small and detailed. Nine-colored pool water glimmers in the background. Chinese ink wash painting meets cyberpunk aesthetic, Dunhuang mural mineral pigment colors, dominant palette: #B0C4DE #FFBF00 #F0EAD6 #2E8B57, cinematic composition, 4K, 16:9 widescreen. No text, no watermark.
panels.narration: 有什么东西蹭她脚踝。一只银色的猫。巴掌大。三条尾巴。蹭一下，抬头看一眼，再蹭一下。
panels.notes: Vita's entrance. Tone shifts from mythic to charming. Ground-level camera.

panels.description_cn: 麦洛低头看着这只银色小猫。试探性地打招呼。
panels.prompt: Low angle looking up at a 14-year-old Chinese girl bending down to look at something near her feet. Her wet black hair hangs forward. Her expression is curious, slightly amused, tentative. She is speaking to something very small at ground level. Warm light from the pool reflects on her face. Chinese ink wash painting meets cyberpunk aesthetic, Dunhuang mural mineral pigment colors, dominant palette: #3CB371 #F0E68C #B0C4DE, cinematic composition, 4K, 16:9 widescreen. No text, no watermark.
panels.notes: Second time she says hello to a stranger in this chapter. It's her default.

panels.description_cn: 银猫打了个喷嚏。银色的小光点从鼻子里喷出来，在空气中炸开，散成一把碎银，落在石头上亮了一下灭了。
panels.prompt: Close-up of a tiny palm-sized silver-white three-tailed cat creature sneezing. Silver sparkles and light particles burst from its tiny nose, exploding outward in a miniature firework of metallic confetti. The silver particles scatter through the air, landing on the warm stone surface where they glow briefly before fading. The cat's ears are flattened back from the sneeze, three tails splayed out. Its fur has a faint blue sheen. Amber eyes squinting. Adorable and ridiculous simultaneously. Chinese ink wash painting meets cyberpunk aesthetic, Dunhuang mural mineral pigment colors, dominant palette: #B0C4DE #F0EAD6 #FFBF00, cinematic composition, 4K, 16:9 widescreen. No text, no watermark.
panels.narration: 银猫打了个喷嚏。是银色的喷嚏。小光点从鼻子里喷出来，散成一把碎银。
panels.notes: Comic relief. The sneeze is adorable and establishes Vita's absurd physicality.

panels.description_cn: 维塔说话了——声音尖、快、硬，带金属底色。抱怨过敏但又蹭她的脚踝，因为她暖和。
panels.prompt: Ground-level shot of the tiny silver three-tailed cat creature looking up defiantly while pressing its body against the girl's ankle. Its posture is contradictory — complaining while cuddling. Amber eyes narrowed. Three tails held stiffly upright. Its mouth is open mid-sentence, revealing tiny teeth. Despite its complaints, it pushes closer to the girl's warm skin. The warm stone ground, the girl's bare feet, the faint glow of the nine-colored pool in the background. Chinese ink wash painting meets cyberpunk aesthetic, Dunhuang mural mineral pigment colors, dominant palette: #B0C4DE #FFBF00 #F0EAD6 #3CB371, cinematic composition, 4K, 16:9 widescreen. No text, no watermark.

dialogue.speaker: 维塔
dialogue.text: 过敏。你身上灵机浓度太高了。我过敏。

panels.notes: Vita's voice: sharp, fast, metallic. Its actions contradict its words — tsundere energy.

panels.description_cn: 维塔不等麦洛开口就开始连珠炮自我介绍：别摸肚子，别揪尾巴，别起名。我叫维塔，V-I-T-A，拉丁语，'生命'。不接受昵称不接受缩写不接受叠字。
panels.prompt: Dynamic composition of the tiny silver three-tailed cat creature in full assertive mode, standing on its hind legs on warm stone. Its three tails unfurl one by one like antennae. Its posture is imperious, like a tiny general issuing commands. Speech bubble energy radiates from it. Behind it, the 14-year-old girl's face shows bemused surprise — she hasn't even opened her mouth yet. The cat's amber eyes are fierce with self-importance. Silver fur bristled slightly. The contrast between its palm-sized body and its enormous personality. Chinese ink wash painting meets cyberpunk aesthetic, Dunhuang mural mineral pigment colors, dominant palette: #B0C4DE #FFBF00 #F0EAD6 #3CB371, cinematic composition, 4K, 16:9 widescreen. No text, no watermark.

dialogue.speaker: 维塔
dialogue.text: 别摸肚子。别揪尾巴。别给我起名。我叫维塔。V-I-T-A。拉丁语。意思是'生命'。不接受昵称，不接受缩写，不接受叠字。

panels.narration: 麦洛还没张嘴。
panels.notes: Rapid-fire delivery. Vita dominates the conversation before it starts.

panels.description_cn: 三条尾巴一条一条翘起来。第一条翘时身体左偏，第二条找到平衡，第三条翘起时整只猫绷成银色三叉戟。
panels.prompt: Sequential close-up of the tiny silver cat creature's three tails rising one by one. First tail rises — the body tilts left. Second tail rises — balance found. Third tail stands straight — the entire creature tenses into the shape of a silver trident, every muscle taut, fur gleaming with blue sheen. The three tails form a perfect fan shape above the tiny body. Amber eyes blazing with intensity. The creature is palm-sized but its presence fills the frame. Warm stone ground, faint pool reflections. Chinese ink wash painting meets cyberpunk aesthetic, Dunhuang mural mineral pigment colors, dominant palette: #B0C4DE #F0EAD6 #FFBF00, cinematic composition, 4K, 16:9 widescreen. No text, no watermark.
panels.narration: 三条尾巴一条一条翘起来。第三条翘起来的时候整只猫身体绷成了一个银色的三叉戟。
panels.notes: Physical comedy. The trident pose is Vita's signature stance.

panels.description_cn: 维塔质问麦洛：你是谁？为什么你笑的时候水会变色？你知不知道你差点把整个渊都点亮了？
panels.prompt: Shot-reverse between the tiny silver three-tailed cat on the ground, looking up with accusatory amber eyes, and the 14-year-old girl looking down with growing amusement. The cat's posture is interrogative, leaning forward, one paw raised. Behind them, the nine-colored pool shimmers — evidence of the disruption the girl caused. The girl's lips curve upward, dimples forming. The height difference is absurd — cat barely reaches her ankle. Chinese ink wash painting meets cyberpunk aesthetic, Dunhuang mural mineral pigment colors, dominant palette: #B0C4DE #FFBF00 #3CB371 #F0E68C, cinematic composition, 4K, 16:9 widescreen. dialogue.speaker: 维塔
dialogue.text: 现在——你是谁？为什么你笑的时候水会变色？你知不知道你刚才差点把整个渊都点亮了？

panels.narration: 麦洛看着它。它看着麦洛。
panels.notes: Comedy beat. Vita is interrogating. Mailo is amused.

panels.description_cn: 麦洛完全不接维塔的问题，反问一个让维塔崩溃的问题。
panels.prompt: Close-up of the 14-year-old girl's face, smiling mischievously, looking down at something off-screen. Her eyes sparkle with amusement. She is clearly not intimidated. Her head tilts slightly in curiosity. Wet black hair frames her face. The expression is pure impish delight — she's about to say something that will annoy this tiny creature very much. Chinese ink wash painting meets cyberpunk aesthetic, Dunhuang mural mineral pigment colors, dominant palette: #3CB371 #F0E68C #FFBF00, cinematic composition, 4K, 16:9 widescreen. No text, no watermark.
panels.notes: Mailo takes control of the conversation instantly.

panels.description_cn: 维塔的毛炸了一圈，愤怒地引用《山海灵宠管理条例》辩解。
panels.prompt: Close-up of the tiny silver cat creature with all its fur puffed out in indignation, tripling its apparent size. Three tails bristling like bottle brushes. Amber eyes wide with outrage. Its mouth is open in mid-rant. Tiny silver sparks crackle around its fur from agitation. It looks like a furious silver dandelion puff. Despite its rage, it remains palm-sized and adorable. Chinese ink wash painting meets cyberpunk aesthetic, Dunhuang mural mineral pigment colors, dominant palette: #B0C4DE #F0EAD6 #FFBF00, cinematic composition, 4K, 16:9 widescreen. No text, no watermark.

dialogue.speaker: 维塔
dialogue.text: 那是系统分配的初始位置！根据《山海灵宠管理条例》第三章——

panels.narration: 维塔的毛炸了一圈。
panels.notes: Peak comedy. Vita quoting regulations while looking like a puffball.

panels.description_cn: 麦洛打断维塔问它多重。维塔精确回答三斤七两但不明白为什么要问。
panels.prompt: Split composition. Left: the 14-year-old girl squatting down, looking at the tiny cat with practical assessment in her eyes — calculating, measuring. Right: the silver three-tailed cat puffing up, offended at the question. Its amber eyes blaze. Three tails pointing in different directions expressing confused indignation. The girl's hands are moving toward the cat — she's about to pick it up. Chinese ink wash painting meets cyberpunk aesthetic, Dunhuang mural mineral pigment colors, dominant palette: #B0C4DE #FFBF00 #3CB371, cinematic composition, 4K, 16:9 widescreen. No text, no watermark.

dialogue.speaker: 维塔
dialogue.text: 三斤七两！精确到克！这和目前的议题有什么关系？

panels.notes: The practical question baffles the intellectual creature.

panels.description_cn: 麦洛弯腰把维塔拎起来——一只手托底一只手扶背，动作很顺，不像第一次拎猫。放在肩上，说只想知道掉下来能不能接住。
panels.prompt: Medium shot of a 14-year-old Chinese girl bending down to pick up a tiny silver three-tailed cat creature. One hand supports its bottom, one hand steadies its back — the motion is fluid, practiced, as if she's done this a thousand times. She lifts it to her shoulder. The cat's amber eyes are wide with surprise at being handled so naturally. Her expression is calm, matter-of-fact, caring. The size difference is endearing — the cat fits in one hand. The nine-colored pool and jade mountains in the background. Chinese ink wash painting meets cyberpunk aesthetic, Dunhuang mural mineral pigment colors, dominant palette: #B0C4DE #3CB371 #F0E68C #FFBF00, cinematic composition, 4K, 16:9 widescreen. No text, no watermark.

dialogue.speaker: 麦洛
dialogue.text: 没关系。就想知道你掉下来我能不能接住。

panels.narration: 她弯腰把它拎起来。动作很顺，不像第一次拎猫。
panels.notes: Key character moment. Her instinct is to protect. The practiced motion hints at her real-world pet experience (hamsters, turtles).

panels.description_cn: 维塔在她肩膀上站了两秒，踩了踩找到凹处蹲稳。三条尾巴分别搭在领口、肩胛骨和后脑勺，绕了一圈收紧。
panels.prompt: Close-up of the tiny silver cat creature settling onto the girl's shoulder. Its small paws test the surface, finding a hollow in the collar bone to nestle into. Three tails extend and wrap: one curls around the collar of her grey-blue jacket, one drapes over her shoulder blade, one reaches up to rest against the back of her head. The tails tighten gently — a seatbelt, a hug. The cat's amber eyes are trying to maintain dignity while clearly being comfortable. The girl's wet black hair is nearby. Silver fur against grey-blue fabric. Chinese ink wash painting meets cyberpunk aesthetic, Dunhuang mural mineral pigment colors, dominant palette: #B0C4DE #F0EAD6 #87CEEB, cinematic composition, 4K, 16:9 widescreen. No text, no watermark.
panels.narration: 三条尾巴分别搭在她的领口、肩胛骨和后脑勺，绕了一圈，收紧。
panels.notes: The tails wrapping = Vita accepting the relationship despite itself.

panels.description_cn: 维塔声称有悬浮功能，麦洛反问那为什么刚才蹭她的脚。维塔沉默了恰好够耳朵转一个角度的时间。——节能模式下悬浮功能关闭。
panels.prompt: Two-panel composition. Top: the silver cat on the girl's shoulder, puffing up pridefully, declaring its hovering capability. Bottom: the same cat, ears rotating sheepishly, caught in a contradiction. The girl's face shows a knowing smile in profile. The cat's amber eyes shift sideways. One ear rotates 30 degrees. The pause between the claim and the excuse is visible in the cat's body language — stiffening, then deflating slightly. Chinese ink wash painting meets cyberpunk aesthetic, Dunhuang mural mineral pigment colors, dominant palette: #B0C4DE #FFBF00 #3CB371, cinematic composition, 4K, 16:9 widescreen. No text, no watermark.

dialogue.speaker: 维塔
dialogue.text: 这种体贴是不必要的。我有悬浮功能。

dialogue.speaker: 麦洛
dialogue.text: 那你刚才为什么蹭我脚？

panels.narration: 维塔沉默了。沉默的时间刚好够它的耳朵转一个角度。
panels.notes: Comedy peak of the chapter. The pause is golden. Vita is caught being vulnerable.

panels.description_cn: 麦洛笑了。水面又变色了——橘红从她站的岸边扩出去，穿过五色穿过黑，一直扩到渊对岸。整个九色渊亮了一瞬，亮得山壁上的石绿都映出了暖色。
panels.prompt: Wide panoramic shot of the entire nine-colored pool lighting up. A 14-year-old Chinese girl stands at the shore with a tiny silver cat on her shoulder, and she is laughing. From her position, a wave of amber-orange (#FFBF00) light radiates across the entire pool surface, piercing through the existing five colors, crossing the black water, reaching the opposite shore. The entire pool blazes warm for one brilliant instant — so bright that the jade-green (#2E8B57) mountain walls reflect the warm orange light. Her laughter is the source. The cat on her shoulder looks back at the water. Mountains, clouds, water — everything lit by one girl's joy. Chinese ink wash painting meets cyberpunk aesthetic, Dunhuang mural mineral pigment colors, dominant palette: #FFBF00 #3CB371 #2E8B57 #87CEEB #DDA0DD, cinematic composition, 4K, 16:9 widescreen. No text, no watermark.
panels.narration: 麦洛笑了。水面又变色了。橘红从她站的岸边扩出去，一直扩到渊的对岸。整个九色渊亮了一瞬。
panels.notes: Visual payoff: her laughter literally lights up the world. Lingji in action.

panels.description_cn: 维塔在她肩上回头看水面。传感器捕捉到数据：灵机纯度从0.03%跳到0.15%，好奇型波动，光谱偏暖，与某份被加密档案匹配度极低。它张了一下嘴又闭上。
panels.prompt: Close-up of the tiny silver cat on the girl's shoulder, turned to look back at the glowing pool. Its amber eyes have tiny data readouts flickering within them — holographic numbers and waveforms visible in the iris: 0.03% jumping to 0.15%. Its expression shifts from analytical to confused to something it cannot name. It opens its mouth as if to speak, then closes it again. The warm orange glow from the pool reflects off its silver fur. Three tails are rigid — processing. Something in its encrypted memory stirs but remains locked. Chinese ink wash painting meets cyberpunk aesthetic, Dunhuang mural mineral pigment colors, dominant palette: #B0C4DE #FFBF00 #3CB371, cinematic composition, 4K, 16:9 widescreen. No text, no watermark.
panels.narration: 它的传感器捕捉到一组数据：灵机纯度从0.03%跳到了0.15%。与它数据库里某份被加密的档案的匹配度极低。它张了一下嘴。又闭上。
panels.notes: Subtle foreshadowing. Vita recognizes something it shouldn't. The encrypted file = Cycle-6 memory.

panels.description_cn: 麦洛指着北面——山谷方向。云层底下有竹林影子在摇，竹梢从云雾里探出来，是活着的绿。
panels.prompt: Medium shot of the 14-year-old girl with the silver cat on her shoulder, pointing north toward distant mountains. Below the cloud layer, the tips of a vast bamboo forest are visible — swaying green spears poking through silver mist. The bamboo is a lighter, livelier green than the mineral mountains — the green of living things. The girl's arm extends toward the forest, curiosity in her posture. The cat on her shoulder follows her gaze. The nine-colored pool is behind them. A path begins. Chinese ink wash painting meets cyberpunk aesthetic, Dunhuang mural mineral pigment colors, dominant palette: #228B22 #2E8B57 #B0C4DE #3CB371, cinematic composition, 4K, 16:9 widescreen. No text, no watermark.

dialogue.speaker: 维塔
dialogue.text: 瑶林。新手引导区。按照流程你应该从那里开始——

panels.notes: Mailo always asks what's further. She pushes past every boundary offered.

panels.description_cn: 麦洛突然问池底那个眼睛是什么。维塔三条尾巴同时卷紧，搭在后脑勺的那条收得太急拽了一下她的头发。
panels.prompt: Close-up reaction shot. The tiny silver cat on the girl's shoulder — all three tails snap tight simultaneously in alarm. The tail resting on the back of her head jerks, pulling her hair. The cat's amber eyes widen. Its fur stands on end. The girl reaches up casually to fix her hair, unfazed. The contrast: the cat's visible alarm versus the girl's calm. The nine-colored pool glimmers ominously in the background. Chinese ink wash painting meets cyberpunk aesthetic, Dunhuang mural mineral pigment colors, dominant palette: #B0C4DE #FFBF00 #1C1C3A #3CB371, cinematic composition, 4K, 16:9 widescreen. No text, no watermark.
panels.narration: 维塔的三条尾巴同时卷紧。不是问句。
panels.notes: Tone shift. Vita's alarm reveals the eye is not supposed to be seen. Major plot thread.

panels.description_cn: 麦洛拨回被尾巴拽歪的头发，平静地描述她看到的：它不凶，就是大，而且它看她的方式——像在等什么人来，但来的不是它等的那个。
panels.prompt: Profile shot of the 14-year-old girl looking back toward the pool, her expression contemplative, older than her years. She tucks displaced hair behind her ear. The tiny silver cat on her shoulder is frozen, listening. Behind them, the nine-colored pool is calm, innocent, concealing its depths. Wind stirs her hair. Her gaze is distant, seeing something the viewer cannot — an understanding beyond her apparent age. The mountains and sky stretch behind her. A moment of unexpected wisdom from a child. Chinese ink wash painting meets cyberpunk aesthetic, Dunhuang mural mineral pigment colors, dominant palette: #3CB371 #87CEEB #1C1C3A #FFBF00, cinematic composition, 4K, 16:9 widescreen. No text, no watermark.

dialogue.speaker: 麦洛
dialogue.text: 嗯。它不凶。就是大。而且它看我的方式——

dialogue.speaker: 麦洛
dialogue.text: 像在等什么人来。但来的不是它等的那个。

panels.narration: 她停了一下。风又来了，竹子的味道更浓。
panels.notes: The most profound line of the chapter. She perceives the eye's loneliness. Vita's silence confirms it.

panels.description_cn: 维塔没接话。安静一阵。风把竹叶味道吹过来又吹走。远处山上的石青石绿在云边凝住，像刚挤出来的颜料。
panels.prompt: Wide establishing shot of the landscape in contemplative silence. Wind visualized as translucent silver currents carrying tiny bamboo leaf fragments. The jade mountains stand still, their mineral green pigment seeming to congeal at the cloud line like freshly squeezed paint on a palette. The girl and the cat on her shoulder are small in the frame, two figures at the edge of a vast colored pool, surrounded by mountains that look painted rather than grown. The silence has weight. The air smells green. Chinese ink wash painting meets cyberpunk aesthetic, Dunhuang mural mineral pigment colors, dominant palette: #2E8B57 #B0C4DE #228B22 #3CB371, cinematic composition, 4K, 16:9 widescreen. No text, no watermark.
panels.narration: 维塔没接话。风把竹叶的味道吹过来又吹走。远处的山上，石青石绿在云的边缘凝住了，像刚挤出来的颜料。
panels.notes: Breathing room. The world-as-painting metaphor becomes literal.

panels.description_cn: 麦洛的声音变轻了——爸爸说山海很大，比地图大，比故事大。她没说完，咬了一下下嘴唇，松开。
panels.prompt: Close-up of the 14-year-old girl's face in profile, her voice going quiet. Her eyes are looking at something far away — not the mountains, something further, something remembered. She bites her lower lip — a gesture too mature for her apparent age — then releases it. Words hang unfinished in the air. The wind moves her hair. Behind her, the vast landscape of colored pool and jade mountains stretches endlessly. The silver cat on her shoulder is perfectly still, listening. Grief and determination mix in her expression. Chinese ink wash painting meets cyberpunk aesthetic, Dunhuang mural mineral pigment colors, dominant palette: #87CEEB #3CB371 #1C1C3A #FFBF00, cinematic composition, 4K, 16:9 widescreen. No text, no watermark.

dialogue.speaker: 麦洛
dialogue.text: 爸爸说山海很大。比地图大。比故事大。他说——

panels.narration: 她没说完。不是忘了，是那个句子到嘴边停住了。她咬了一下下嘴唇，松开。
panels.notes: The unfinished sentence about her father. The lip bite = inherited adult habit (from character bible). Emotional weight.

panels.description_cn: 她说"走吧"。简短，决断。维塔在她肩上动了一下，三条尾巴收紧了半圈。
panels.prompt: Medium shot of the 14-year-old girl turning away from the pool to face the northern mountains and the distant bamboo forest. Her posture shifts — shoulders square, chin up. The word she speaks is short and decisive. The silver cat adjusts on her shoulder, three tails tightening half a revolution. She has made her choice. Behind her, the nine-colored pool spirals on unchanged. Before her, a narrow path of warm stones leads toward cloud-wrapped mountains. She is backlit by the pool's ambient glow. Chinese ink wash painting meets cyberpunk aesthetic, Dunhuang mural mineral pigment colors, dominant palette: #2E8B57 #3CB371 #228B22 #B0C4DE, cinematic composition, 4K, 16:9 widescreen. No text, no watermark.
panels.narration: 维塔在她肩上动了一下。三条尾巴收紧了半圈。
panels.notes: Departure. Two words. No looking back.

panels.description_cn: 维塔的声音压低了，金属底色磨成哑光：这条路往北走，三百里后分岔。左边的人活着回来过。右边的没有。麦洛没问走哪边。
panels.prompt: Wide shot of a narrow stone path leading north from the pool's edge, stretching toward jade-green mountains shrouded in silver clouds. In the far distance, the path is barely visible splitting into two directions. The girl with the cat on her shoulder stands at the beginning of the path, facing forward. The path is lined with low grass bearing pale blue dewdrops. The left fork disappears into gentler terrain; the right fork leads into darker, steeper mountains. The girl takes her first step. She does not ask which way. Chinese ink wash painting meets cyberpunk aesthetic, Dunhuang mural mineral pigment colors, dominant palette: #2E8B57 #228B22 #B0C4DE #3CB371, cinematic composition, 4K, 16:9 widescreen. No text, no watermark.

dialogue.speaker: 维塔
dialogue.text: 这条路往北走，三百里后分岔。左边的人活着回来过。右边的没有。

panels.narration: 它的声音压低了，金属底色磨成了哑光。麦洛没问走哪边。
panels.notes: Ominous foreshadowing. Vita's voice change signals danger ahead. Mailo's silence = she already knows.

panels.description_cn: 麦洛迈开步子。赤脚踩在碎石上——石头都是温的。两侧矮草挂着淡青色露水。她一边走一边哼歌——跑调，断断续续，翻来覆去几个音。
panels.prompt: Medium tracking shot following a 14-year-old barefoot girl walking along a narrow warm stone path. A tiny silver cat rides on her shoulder. Her bare feet step on round pebbles that radiate gentle warmth. Low grass on both sides of the path is dotted with pale cyan dewdrops — not transparent but tinted, like diluted mineral green from the mountains. She walks at an easy pace, humming a tune — off-key, fragments of a melody that keeps breaking and restarting. Her wet grey-blue jacket is drying. The nine-colored pool recedes behind her. Bamboo forest grows closer ahead. Morning light. Chinese ink wash painting meets cyberpunk aesthetic, Dunhuang mural mineral pigment colors, dominant palette: #2E8B57 #228B22 #3CB371 #F0E68C, cinematic composition, 4K, 16:9 widescreen. No text, no watermark.
panels.narration: 她赤脚踩在碎石上，石头都是温的。她一边走一边哼歌。跑调的。断断续续的。
panels.notes: The humming is fragments of Shanhai Yao — the melody locked in Vita's memory. She doesn't know the full song.

panels.description_cn: 维塔的耳朵抖了一下。它记忆深处有一段旋律被锁死了，连自己的钥匙也打不开。但锁芯在震——她嘴里哼出的调子和锁里那段重合了九成。它没告诉她。
panels.prompt: Extreme close-up of the silver cat's pointed ear twitching. Deep within its amber eye, a locked memory visualized as a tiny glowing keyhole pulsing with resonance — the locked melody inside vibrating in sympathy with the girl's humming. The keyhole glows warmer but does not open. The cat's expression is unreadable — surprise? recognition? longing? It deliberately looks away from the girl's face. It keeps this secret. The fur around its ear catches the light. A single amber tear that could be a data artifact gathers at the corner of its eye but does not fall. Chinese ink wash painting meets cyberpunk aesthetic, Dunhuang mural mineral pigment colors, dominant palette: #B0C4DE #FFBF00 #1C1C3A, cinematic composition, 4K, 16:9 widescreen. No text, no watermark.
panels.narration: 维塔的耳朵抖了一下。它记忆深处有一段旋律被锁死了。她嘴里哼出的调子和锁里那段，重合了九成。它没告诉她。
panels.notes: CRITICAL FORESHADOWING. Vita's locked Cycle-6 memory resonates with Mailo's humming. A seed planted for the entire series.

panels.description_cn: 远景：九色渊越来越远。渊面恢复九色，色带各走各道。风还是绕着走。鸟不飞过。苔痕到水线断掉。一切和她来之前一样——除了水底。
panels.prompt: Wide aerial shot pulling away from the nine-colored pool. The pool has returned to its eternal state — nine bands spiraling independently, no ripples, wind bypassing the surface. The girl and her cat are now a tiny figure on a distant stone path heading north toward bamboo-covered mountains. Everything looks exactly as it did before she arrived. Moss stops at the waterline. No birds above. The mountains guard their circle. Perfect, ancient, undisturbed. But the camera is slowly descending into the water — sinking below the surface toward the depths. Chinese ink wash painting meets cyberpunk aesthetic, Dunhuang mural mineral pigment colors, dominant palette: #3CB371 #F0E68C #2E8B57 #1C1C3A #B0C4DE, cinematic composition, 4K, 16:9 widescreen. No text, no watermark.
panels.narration: 身后，九色渊越来越远。一切都和她来之前一样。除了水底。
panels.notes: The 'except' is the turn. Everything is the same — except.

panels.description_cn: 最终画面。那只眼睛重新睁开了。竖瞳里五色流转比刚才快了一点——快了百分之零点七。在瞳仁最深处，有一个极小的裂痕亮了。上一次它亮的时候，九色渊外的三座山还不存在。它看着她离开的方向。看了很久。然后它又闭上了。
panels.prompt: FINAL SPLASH — underwater view. The enormous vertical-slit eye has reopened in the dark depths of the pool. The five colors within the pupil rotate slightly faster than before — a subtle acceleration. Emerald green spins quicker, goose yellow keeps pace, sky blue flickers faster, purple and orange twist tighter around each other. Deep within the very center of the pupil, an infinitesimal crack of ancient light glows — a fissure that last shone when three of the surrounding mountains did not yet exist. The eye gazes in one direction — toward where the girl walked away — with infinite patience, and something that in a human would be called hope. The eye is surrounded by absolute darkness of deep water. Five-colored light from the pupil illuminates nothing but itself. Then slowly, the eye closes again. The final sliver of light — amber-orange — extinguishes. Darkness. No text, no watermark.
panels.narration: 那只眼睛重新睁开了。竖瞳里五色流转的速度比刚才快了一点。在瞳仁最深处，有一个极小的裂痕亮了。上一次它亮的时候，九色渊外的三座山还不存在。它看着她离开的方向。看了很久。然后它又闭上了。
panels.notes: FINAL SPLASH. The chapter's true ending. The eye's heartbeat quickened. Something ancient has been stirred. The crack = a secret older than the mountains. Fade to black. Chapter complete.
